name: PAY_PARAM_CONTEXTS_VL
query: SELECT B.PARAM_CONTEXT_ID, B.BASE_CONTEXT_NAME, B.PERSIST_FLAG, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, B.MODULE_ID, TL.CONTEXT_NAME, TL.DESCRIPTION FROM PAY_PARAM_CONTEXTS_B B, PAY_PARAM_CONTEXTS_TL TL WHERE B.PARAM_CONTEXT_ID = TL.PARAM_CONTEXT_ID AND USERENV('LANG') = TL.LANGUAGE
